steps.title: Use two points on the fit line
steps.content: For a slope question, choose two points on the line of best fit. The line passes approximately through $(0,0.2)$ and $(5,9.3)$.

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: The closest answer choice to $1.82$ is $1.8$. Choice A, $0.2$, is the approximate $y$-intercept, not the slope. Therefore choice C is correct.
